title: platanthera engleriana
intro: Platanthera engleriana, also known as Engler's orchid or the northern green orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to eastern Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where its roots are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Platanthera engleriana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and prevent infections. Platanthera engleriana can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
